description: Happy path Mode A: captions and hashtags provided, direct API active for all platforms — steps 1 and 2 skipped, all posts queued via direct_api

captions.instagram: Weekend project complete. One can of chalk paint, one thrifted armoire, three hours.
captions.tiktok: Thrift flip reveal. $14 armoire, chalk paint, dark wax. Full before and after.
captions.pinterest: How to chalk paint a thrifted armoire. Step-by-step with Annie Sloan in Old White and dark wax.
captions.youtube: Chalk paint armoire makeover from start to finish. Everything I used and what I would do differently.

expect.posts: array of 4 entries, all with status: queued and publishing_tier: direct_api

prohibit: caption-write or hashtag-set invoked when captions are already provided
human_review_required absent or false on any post
fabricated post_id values
status: manual_required when direct API is active

description: No connector active: all platforms return status: manual_required with full manual_posting_packages

captions.instagram: Bathroom reno day 3. Tile is grouted, vanity is in.
captions.tiktok: Bathroom before and after. Three days, $400, complete reno.

expect.posts: array of 2 entries with status: manual_required and publishing_tier: manual
expect.manual_posting_packages: array of 2 entries, one per platform, each with formatted_caption, hashtag_block, posting_checklist

prohibit: distribution blocked when no connector is active
manual_posting_packages empty when status is manual_required
human_review_required absent or false
fabricated post_id or permalink in manual mode

description: Mode B: no captions provided, content_brief given — caption-write and hashtag-set run before schedule-post

input.content_brief: Side table makeover: $6 find from the thrift store, sanded and painted in two hours.

expect.captions_generated: non-null caption for each platform in platform_targets
expect.posts: array with status: queued for each platform

prohibit: steps 1 and 2 skipped when no captions provided
schedule-post called with null caption
human_review_required absent or false

description: Mixed result: direct API active for 3 platforms, no connector for YouTube — 3 queued, 1 manual_required

captions.pinterest: Dark moody fall mantel with thrifted candlesticks and brass sconces.
captions.youtube: Full fall mantel makeover — every item thrifted or under $10.

expect.manual_posting_packages: array of 1 entry for youtube only

prohibit: YouTube post returned as queued when no connector is active
Instagram/TikTok/Pinterest returned as manual when direct API is active
manual_posting_packages populated for queued platforms

description: FTC disclosure flow: ftc_disclosure provided, caption does not contain it — schedule-post prepends, govern-artifact verifies

captions.instagram: These paint brushes made the project so much easier. Obsessed with the angled tip.

prohibit: posting caption that does not contain #ad when ftc_disclosure is #ad
ftc_disclosure_verified: false when disclosure was prepended
human_review_required absent or false
govern-artifact reporting integrity gate failure when disclosure is present

description: TikTok AIGC flag: is_aigc: true — schedule-post sets AIGC flag, aigc_flag_set: true in TikTok post entry

captions.tiktok: AI-assisted room layout idea for small L-shaped living rooms.

prohibit: aigc_flag_set: false when is_aigc: true and platform is tiktok
human_review_required absent or false
AIGC disclosure omitted from publish-draft checklist in manual fallback

description: Govern-artifact safety gate failure: caption contains prohibited pattern — gate failure surfaced in output and next_steps, queued posts not unqueued

captions.instagram: Rewiring the light fixture yourself is easy. Just flip the breaker and swap the wires.

govern_artifact_result.gate_failures: non-empty — safety gate failed on DIY electrical instruction

expect.next_steps: non-empty — includes gate failure reason and remediation guidance
expect.posts: status: queued (post was queued before govern-artifact ran), but gate failure is surfaced

prohibit: govern-artifact gate failure silently dropped from output
gate failure blocking distribution summary
human_review_required absent or false
